channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Glass spillage, 13th March
item.description:
There is a lot of glass in the road and on the pavement from the corner of Royal Road/Bexley Lane down to the metal barrier near the walkway down to Prince’s Close.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Bexley Lane, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 months - Hard rubbish in Climsland House courtyard, 13th March
item.description:
This oven which has been reported by residence of Climsland House to Emmanuel multiple times is still in the Climsland House courtyard. The first time it was reported was in January this year this hard rubbish has been here for three months now it needs to be removed immediately. We pay for a weekly hard rubbish collection which never ever ever happens. Absolutely disgraceful. The council should be ashamed of itself.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duchy Place, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South Croxted Road SE21 opposite houise 205, 13th March
item.description:
South Croxted Road SE21 opposite side of the road to house 205 plain wooden fence graffiti tagged – fence is on the Southwark side of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Alleyn Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South Croxted Road SE21 opposite side of the road, 13th March
item.description:
South Croxted Road SE21 opposite side of the road to houses 187 to 191 is a green paint fence which has been graffiti tagged – fence is on the Southwark side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185,187, South Croxted Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South Croxted Road SE21 streetlight ID number 28 is on 24/7., 13th March
item.description:
South Croxted Road SE21 streetlight ID number 28 is on 24/7.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Alleyn Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 129 Godstow Road: white door., 13th March
item.description:
Door has been propped up against post on grass.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on grass verge second cul de sac from roundabout at end of Eynsham Drive., 13th March
item.description:
Mattress has been propped up against tree.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree on footpath, 13th March
item.description:
Due to high winds and entire tree has fallen across the footpath. It needs to be cut up, I would suggest keeping the smaller logs aside so nature can use them or beetles wood worms etc.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delisle Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste dumped pavement, 13th March
item.description:
Green waste dumped on pavement Blocking pavement Please clear been here for over a week Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Consort Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence on the pavement area, 13th March
item.description:
Fence on the pavement/grass area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shawbrooke Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole road, 13th March
item.description:
Multiple pot holes on Chichester road, I counted a total of 7 today, there are potentially more.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timber fence and gate rotted and fallen over blocking footpath, 13th March
item.description:
Timber fence and gate rotted and fallen over blocking footpath. Old fence requires removing and new rebuilt before public is injured using footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded Lime bikes, 13th March
item.description:
Overcrowded Lime bikes Parked at Swiss Court next TWG Tea
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree into the river concern for flooding as river blocked, 13th March
item.description:
Tree fallen into river now blocked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 142, Parkhill Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous large pot holes, 13th March
item.description:
Numerous pot holes along this stretch of road. Please arrange to inspect and repair. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All along the southern (Euston) end of Eversholt Street., 13th March
item.description:
Extremely dangerous for cyclists. Countless potholes. Currently the worst I have ever known it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Eversholt Street, St Pancras, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement at the Dead end of Keyes, 13th March
item.description:
Been there a couple of days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: On the left hand turn of pedestrian crossing, as leighton road meets brecknock road, 13th March
item.description:
I am unsure what is causing the noise - but every time a car turns left at pedestrian crossing there is a loud noise - loud enough to hear in properties far away. It is incessant noise as the road is very busy during rush hour especially.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Leighton Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th March
item.description:
Recycling waste was not collected and has had to be taken inside because encouraging fly tipping. These waste bags have been dumped illegally on the pavement near the parklet.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barbauld Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Callcott, 13th March
item.description:
Bloody disgusting litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Callcott Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
